named_npcs.name: Toha Makima
named_npcs.description: Leader of Toha Heavy Industries. Controls industrial and transport operations.

named_npcs.name: Poison_Kiss
named_npcs.description: Leader of TekNet Megacorp. Skilled hacker who commands TekNet's operations.

named_npcs.name: Hatlee Hosaka
named_npcs.description: Family Patriarch / CEO of MezoTuring Hosaka. Martian family head; controls digital money operations.

named_npcs.name: The Elder
named_npcs.description: Dragon of The Elder. Iridescent scales; motivations unknown.

named_npcs.name: Eli
named_npcs.description: Insurgent Leader of Insurgents. Field commander; true name unknown.

named_npcs.name: Sarge Heinlein
named_npcs.description: Corp Sec Commander of Corporate Security (APX). Enforcer of APX corporate interests on Ganymede.

named_npcs.name: Old Finn
named_npcs.description: Hustler / Fixer of Scavengers. Key contact for scavenged goods and local intelligence.
